item.title: He's now a blind snake charmer. ( video )
item.description: He's now a blind snake charmer.

item.title: A story similar to the one in \u201cSixth, Sense\u201d happened in Poland, in one of the cleaning companies. A woman had been topping up a colleague's tea with a toxic substance in her absence for several months. The victim realized and recorded it with a hidden camera. ( video )
item.description: A story similar to the one in \u201cSixth, Sense\u201d happened in Poland, in one of the cleaning companies. A woman had been topping up a colleague's tea with a toxic substance in her absence for several months. The victim realized and recorded it with a hidden camera.
